valueString.value: The astronaut/crewmember subject of this medical requirement

description.value: NASA Medical Requirements Integration Document for audiometric assessment. Captures pre- and postflight hearing threshold data to monitor crew hearing status.

purpose.value: To assess pre- and postflight hearing thresholds on crew members using pure tone audiometry

copyright.value: NASA Johnson Space Center - Medical Requirements Integration Documents (MRIDs) JSC28913

valueString.value: To assess pre- and postflight hearing thresholds on crew members using pure tone audiometry. To track hearing changes across missions.
Pure tone air conduction thresholds at 500, 1000, 2000, 3000, 4000, 6000, 8000 Hz
Pure tone audiometry is performed in a sound-treated booth. Testing includes air conduction thresholds at standard frequencies.
Annual medical examination and L-60 to L-10 days

text.value: N/A - Included as part of Medical Operations overall debrief
